commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Dirt. Literally, "treading "conculcationem. (Haydock)
The works of the wicked are fruitless. They have no content. (Calmet) Non enim gazæ neque consular is Summovet lictor miseros tumultus, Mentis et curas laqueata circum, Tecta volantes.
-- (Horace, ii. ode 16.)
The obstinate sinner can receive no pardon. (Worthington)
